## Summary

A brief description of the feature or spec change you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this should work. Include example JSON if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
